---
title: "UNIT 1 - SaTScan and Whole Genome Sequencing Enhanced Outbreak Investigation Protocol"
---

![](images/Digital Epidemiology Workshop Module_2026_page-0005.jpg)

![](images/Digital Epidemiology Workshop Module_2026_page-0006.jpg)

![](images/Digital Epidemiology Workshop Module_2026_page-0007.jpg)

![](images/Digital Epidemiology Workshop Module_2026_page-0008.jpg)

![](images/Digital Epidemiology Workshop Module_2026_page-0009.jpg)

![](images/Digital Epidemiology Workshop Module_2026_page-0010 - Copy-01.jpg)
